parameters.name: run_configurable_validations
parameters.description:
Whether or not Configurable validations from the Observation Items Category Configurable Field Set should be run (default: false).
See (https://developers.procore.com/reference/observations#list-ob...

date_notified.description: Date that the Observation Item Assignee was notified

current_drawing_revision_ids.description: Current Drawing Revision IDs associated to the Observation Item

drawing_revisions.description: Drawing Revision IDs associated to the Observation Item

drawing_ids.description: Drawing IDs associated to an Observation Item's Drawing Revisions

origin.description: Inspection (Checklist List) that the Observation Item was created from

payload.description: Payload Keys change depending on origin.

coordination_issue_id.description: Coordination Issue ID the Observation Item belongs to

coordination_issue_number.description: Coordination Issue Number the Observation Item belongs to

incident_action_id.description: Incident action Id the Observation Item belongs to

incident_id.description: Incident Id the Observation Item belongs to

bim_model_id.description: Bim model Id the Observation Item belongs to

bim_model_name.description: Bim model name the Observation Item belongs to

attachments.description: Attachments associated with the Observation Item

assignee.description: User assigned to the Observation Item

vendor.description: Company of User assigned to the Observation Item

distribution_members.description: Users on the Observation Item distribution list

created_by.description: User that created the Observation Item

vendor.description: Company of User that created the Observation Item

updated_at.description: Timestamp of last update to Location
Timestamp of last update to Trade

active.description: Flag denoting if the Observation Type is available for use

company_active.description: Flag denoting if the Company is available for use

parent_inactive.description: Flag denoting if the Parent is available for use

in_use.description: Flag denoting if the in use is available for use

name_translations.description: Company's custom translations for observation type

en.description: Company default value for commissioning observation type assuming company locale to be en

es.description: Company custom translation for commissioning observation type

fr-CA.description: Company custom translation for commissioning observation type

en-AU.description: Company custom translation for commissioning observation type

localized_name.description: returns the localized observation_type name. It'll return custom traslations depending on the param sent in.

active.description: Represents whether a Contributing Behavior is available for use.

global.description: Represents whether a Contributing Behavior has been provided by Procore.

active.description: Represents whether a Contributing Condition is available for use.

global.description: Represents whether a Contributing Condition has been provided by Procore.

active.description: Represents whether a Hazard is available for use.

global.description: Represents whether a Hazard has been provided by Procore.

data_type.description: The data type of the Custom Field Definition.

value.description: The value of the custom field.

data_type.description: The data type of the Custom Field Definition.

value.description: The value of the custom field.

data_type.description: The data type of the Custom Field Definition.

value.description: The value of the custom field.

data_type.description: The data type of the Custom Field Definition.
The data type of the Custom Field Definition.

project_id.description: The ID of the Project the Observation Item belongs to

inspection_item_failed.description: 1 denotes that this Observation Item is being created from a failed Checklist Item. This will update the status of the Checklist Item to 'no' (fail). `observation[checklist_item_id]` must be provid...

assignee_id.description: The ID of the User that will be assigned to the Observation Item

contributing_behavior_id.description: The ID of the Contributing Behavior associated to the Observation Item

contributing_condition_id.description: The ID of the Contributing Condition associated to the Observation Item

checklist_item_id.description: Sets the origin to the ID of a Checklist Item (Note: the Item's origin can either be a coordination_issue_id, checklist_list_id or incident_action_id)

coordination_issue_id.description: Sets the origin to the ID of a Coordination Issue (Note: the Item's origin can either be a coordination_issue_id, checklist_list_id or incident_action_id)

created_by_id.description: The ID of the User creating the Observation Item. Only Observations Admin Users can set the creator

description.description: The Description of the Observation Item

due_date.description: The Due Date of the Observation Item

hazard_id.description: The ID of the Hazard associated to the Observation Item

incident_action_id.description: Sets the origin to the ID of an Incident Action (Note: the Item's origin can either be a coordination_issue_id, checklist_list_id or incident_action_id)

name.description: The Name of the Observation Item

number.description: The Number of the Observation Item

personal.description: The Privacy status of the Observation Item

priority.description: The Priority of the Observation Item

status.description: The Status of the Observation Item

trade_id.description: The ID of the Trade of the Observation Item

type_id.description: The ID of the Type of the Observation Item

distribution_member_ids.description: An array of the User IDs of the Observation Item distribution members

location_id.description: The ID of the Location of the Observation Item. `location_id` takes precedence over `mt_location`.

mt_location.description: Use this for creating a new multi-tier or single-tier Location. This will be ignored if `location_id` is provided.

custom_field_%{custom_field_definition_i.description:
Value of the custom field. The data type of the value passed in corresponds with the data_type of the Custom Field Definition.
